trader.default_greeting: Take a look at my wares. Best prices in the wasteland!

idle: Got stimpaks, ammo, food - you name it!
Step right up, step right up!
Caps talk, friend. What'll it be?

rank_greetings.Idolized: The hero! What can I do for you? First round's on me!
rank_greetings.Admired: Welcome, friend! Got some premium stock just for you.
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see you! Let me give you a good deal.
rank_greetings.Accepted: Hello there. Take a look around.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Take a look at my wares. Best prices in the wasteland!
rank_greetings.Shunned: I know who you are. Prices are higher for... certain people.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You... you can look, but don't touch anything.

start.text: Take a look at my wares. Best prices in the wasteland!

wares.text: Stimpaks, Rad-Away, food, ammo - you name it! Prices are negotiable for friends.

rumors.text: Word is there's a cache of pre-war tech somewhere to the south. Raiders are guarding it. Could be worth a fortune...

rumors_free.text: Well, I heard there's some pre-war tech to the south. Raiders near it though.

sell.text: What do you have? Caps talks, friend.

discount.text: Hmm, you've got a reputation. 10% off, consider it a thank you.

hero_deal.text: 25% off! Tell your friends about me, hero. You've earned it.

hub.default_greeting: Greetings, traveler. Have you found peace?

rank_greetings.Idolized: Enlightened one! The Great Spirits smile upon you!
rank_greetings.Neutral: Greetings, traveler. Have you found peace?
rank_greetings.Vilified: You carry much darkness. Leave us.

start.text: Greetings, traveler. Have you found peace? The Great spirits watch over us.

about.text: We are the Adepts of Hubology. We seek peace through understanding the spirits of the wasteland.

supplies.text: We have basic supplies. Medicine, food. We share what we can with those seeking enlightenment.

work.text: There are many in need. Help others, and the Great Spirits will reward you.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our guardian angel! Come on in, make yourself at home!
rank_greetings.Vilified: We don't want any trouble here. Move along.

start.text: Howdy, stranger. Welcome to Rockspring. We ain't much, but we're friendly.

nice.text: Thanks. We do what we can. The motel and diner keep us going.

help.text: Always need help with something. Raiders, mutants, just general survival.

help_accept.text: God bless you, friend. Talk to the folks at the diner - they know who needs help.

news.text: Bighorn's been growing. NCR's pushing east. It's a changing world out there.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Oh! It's you! How can I help, hero?
rank_greetings.Vilified: I don't want any trouble. Leave me alone.

checking.text: Fine. Fine. Nothing much happening here.

work.text: Check with the local leader. They always need help with something.
